sources.title: The Children 2008 Dvdrip
sources.description: A relaxing Christmas vacation turns into a terrifying fight for survival as the children begin to turn on their parents.

metadata.Plot: Elaine and Jonah and their teenage daughter and young son and daughter, come to spend New Year with her sister Chloe and husband Robbie and their two young children at their isolated country home. One by one the children, after apparently being sick, become increasingly malevolent.
metadata.Actors: Eva Birthistle, Stephen Campbell Moore, Jeremy Sheffield
